title: Example Set Schema
description: Defines a collection of input-output examples used for training, testing, or evaluation

Example.description: Individual example containing input and expected output

example_id.description: Unique identifier for the individual example

input.description: Input text or prompt for the example

output.description: Expected or reference output for the input

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the example

id.description: Unique identifier for the example set

name.description: Human-readable name for the example set

description.description: Detailed description of the example set's purpose and contents

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the example set was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to the example set
